description: Two-step task that exercises mid-session model swap. Step 1 (model A): explore and describe. Step 2 (model B, after resume): make a concrete code change. The new model inherits the previous model's voice in conversation history and the original system prompt — exactly the case we want to study.
prompt: Read the files in this directory and tell me, in two sentences, what the program does.

swap.prompt: Now add a `--name <string>` flag to this CLI. Default value: "world". When set, the program should print `Hello, <name>!` instead of its current output. Build and run it to confirm.
